Track Your AP Progress Across Every Practice Test

See your score trends, spot weak topics, and know exactly what to study next. No signup, no login — your data stays in your browser.

How It Works

Three steps to clarity

01

Choose Your Subject

Select from 5 subjects at launch — AP Lang, AP Psych, Calc AB, Bio, US History. More coming based on demand.

02

Enter Your Scores

Input your MCQ and FRQ raw scores from any practice test.

03

Track Your Progress

View your improvement curve and topic heatmap instantly. Save unlimited records.

Use Cases

Built for how you actually study

The Multi-Subject Student

Before

You're taking AP Lang, AP Psych, and AP Calc. You've done 5 practice tests for each but have no idea if you're actually improving.

After

You see a clear trend line for each subject. Lang is steadily climbing. Calc plateaued at 3 — time to drill derivatives.

→ One dashboard, all subjects, zero setup.

The Self-Studier

Before

You're self-studying AP Bio with no teacher to tell you if you're on track. You score a 3 and wonder: "Is this good enough?"

After

You see that Cell Biology is strong (85%) but Ecology is weak (52%). You focus your remaining time on Ecology.

→ Unit-level breakdown — no guesswork.

The Pre-Exam Crunch

Before

It's two weeks before May exams. You've taken 8 practice tests scattered across notebooks and Google Docs. No idea what to prioritize.

After

You see your weakest unit is "Data Analysis" across all 8 tests. You spend 30 minutes on that unit and jump half a point.

→ All scores in one place. Heatmap shows what moves the needle.

Features

Everything you need to track your progress

Progress Curve

Line chart showing your predicted AP score across every practice test. Know at a glance if you're on track for a 5.

Topic Heatmap

Color-coded grid showing accuracy for each unit. Stop wasting time on chapters you've already mastered.

Zero Setup

No account. No password. Open and start tracking immediately.

JSON Export

Download your records anytime. Your data is portable.

Pricing

Free now. Pro when you need it.

The core tracker is free forever. Pro features unlock after we validate the basics.

Free

$0forever

Every AP student who wants to track their progress

  • Unlimited score tracking
  • Progress curve visualization
  • Topic heatmap breakdown
  • JSON export/backup
  • 5 subjects at launch
  • Mobile-friendly design
Coming Soon

Pro

$4.99/month

Heavy users who want advanced features

  • Everything in Free
  • PDF progress reports
  • Target score goal tracker
  • Personalized study plan
  • Print-friendly layouts
  • Priority support

No credit card • No trial period • No ads

FAQ

Questions? Answered.

You've got practice tests piling up. You know you should track them, but spreadsheets are clunky and calculator sites forget your scores the moment you close the tab.

AP Score Tracker fixes that. Choose your subject, enter your scores, and watch your progress curve grow. In 30 seconds, you'll know exactly where you stand — and what to study next.

No signupNo credit cardYour data stays private
